title: The Bilateral Netting of Qualified Financial Contracts Act, 2020
full_text: The Bilateral Netting of Qualified Financial Contracts Act, 2020 अर्हित वित्तीय संविदा द्विपक्षीय नेटिंग अधिनियम, 2020 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202030 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 2020-09-28 Act Year: 2020 Short Title: The Bilateral Netting of Qualified Financial Contracts Act, 2020 Hindi Title: अर्हित वित्तीय संविदा द्विपक्षीय नेटिंग अधिनियम, 2020 Long Title: An Act to ensure financial stability and promote competitiveness in Indian financial markets by providing enforceability of bilateral netting of qualified financial contracts and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto.
